notes.body: GM Call Recap — The Power of One: One Brand/One Team/One Family. Ops Manual is the single source of truth. Develop 2 future GMs/yr, min 6 Shift Leaders. Shopper scores: many stores hitting 100% — win the Halo Effect (Wow at register/make line/pickup).
Ops Manual: The Power of One — updated Operations Manual sent; reference and train consistency.

KPI Ranking — 60% of score = Secret Shops + Customer complaints (CSPs) + Ticket times. Tighten: handle unhappy guests early, spot-check register (fry/drink/shake offered), coach in shift huddles, greet every guest, grill culture (2 patties guys/1 girls), stay rush-ready.
9 'Sensor Not Reporting In' alerts overnight. Temp sensor offline — walk the unit, confirm back online, file a hub ticket if hardware fault.
KY-2065 open tasks: Labor Review 6/25, Labor Review 6/26, VO-Rec Performance Fdsvce 6/26, VO-Rec BOSS Alpha-Ohio Valley 6/26.
